parameters.query: SELECT n8n_workflow_ids, status FROM automation_purchases WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('02. Preparer donnees').first().json.tenantId }}'::uuid AND automation_id = '{{ $('02. Preparer donnees').first().json.automationId }}'::uuid

UPDATE automation_purchases SET status = 'suspendue', suspended_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $json.tenantId }}'::uuid AND automation_id = '{{ $json.automationId }}'::uuid RETURNING id, status
